import pytest
from source import find_in_sorted

def test_find_in_sorted_last_element():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    index = find_in_sorted(arr, 7)
    assert index == 4, f"Expected index 4 for value 7 in {arr}, got {index}"

from source import find_in_sorted

def test_find_in_sorted_missing_upper_boundary():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    target = 8  # value greater than any element, triggers upper‑half recursion bug
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, target)
    assert result == -1, f"Expected -1 when searching for missing target {target}, got {result}"
